metadata.name: Add Birthday Bonus to Loyalty Account

description: As part of the loyalty program, customers receive bonus points on their birthday. The system needs to automate this.

nodes.task_description: Each day, query the customer database for all customers whose birthday is today.

expected_outcome.value: System generates a list of customers celebrating their birthday.

nodes.task_description: For each customer on the list, add 100 bonus points to their loyalty account.

expected_outcome.value: System successfully updates the loyalty balance for all eligible customers.

nodes.task_description: Send each customer a 'Happy Birthday' email mentioning their bonus points.

expected_outcome.value: System sends a personalized birthday email.
